pages.text: $(bold)heartFloor$(): minimum base hearts. Default 3. Range 1 to 10.
$(bold)deathGracePeriodSeconds$(): grace window after a death heart loss. Default 60 seconds. Range 0 to 600.
$(bold)bedRegenCooldownMinutes$(): wait time between sleep based heart restores. Default 15 minutes. Range 0 to 1440.
$(bold)bedRegenHeartThreshold$(): bed regen stops once you have this many base hearts. Default 7. Range 1 to 10.
$(bold)showHardcoreHearts$(): if true, the HUD uses hardcore style hearts and shows lost hearts as empty outlines. Default true.
$(bold)respawnImmunityEnabled$(): grants brief damage immunity after respawn. Default true.
$(bold)respawnImmunitySeconds$(): seconds of respawn immunity. Default 5. Range 1 to 60.
